PSTT parity gates blocked in this migration slice (2026-07-18)
==============================================================

E0 (source preservation): runnable — verify all freeze_manifest_*.sha256 under
.local/selection_paper remain unchanged and pass shasum.

E1 (small golden pipeline): covered by tests/fixtures/pstt/e1_* synthetic
fixtures and tests/pstt_*_gate.rs. These are independently named synthetic
rows, not subsets of frozen paper artifacts.

E2 (frozen standalone application parity): BLOCKED
  Missing local copies of:
    - deep_subset_usdc_weth_swaps.csv.gz
    - complete m6_block_ts.csv (local file is incomplete acquisition)
    - binance_ethusdc_full / BBO archives
  Additional provenance limit: build_m6_public.py derives bootstrap seeds via
  Python salted hash(...) without recording PYTHONHASHSEED, so historical
  inference draws are not exactly replayable even if inputs are recovered.

E3 (frozen panel Stage-4 table parity): BLOCKED
  Missing local copies of:
    - events.csv.gz (SHA named by Stage-4 config)
    - references/aggTrades archives (thousands of zip files)
  Available locally: block timestamps, pool-blocks, inclusion/inventory, and
  frozen Stage-4 output tables (usable as future goldens once inputs exist).

Policy: do not start P1 projection/classification work until E2/E3 raw inputs
are available and P0 frozen weekly parity is reviewed. Rust outputs must keep
new names and must not edit historical freeze manifests.
